title: Suggestions & the Chief's Tablet
subtitle: How a chiefdom hears its people

pages.text: Under a Chiefdom, citizens raise &6Suggestions&r in the town hall's Suggestions tab. These cover several kinds of settlement need, and an unread suggestion is flagged so you do not miss it.
For each suggestion you may &6Resolve&r it — acting on what the citizens want — or &6Ignore&r it. Resolving keeps your people content; ignoring saves effort but slowly wears on morale.

The chief can also act directly: exile a troublesome citizen, or issue registration tablets to bring new members in. Direct power is the chiefdom's strength; use it sparingly enough that the tribe still feels heard.
